<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Write packet ID
        stream.put(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
        
        // Write username with fixed-length prefix
        const std::uint32_t username_len = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(username.size());
        stream.put(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
        stream.write(username.data(), username.size());
        
        // Write scores count with fixed-length prefix, then scores
        const std::uint32_t scores_count = static_cast<std::uint32_t>(scores.size());
        stream.put(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
        for (const auto& score : scores) {
            stream.put(&score, sizeof(score));
        }
        
        // Write metadata as null-terminated string
        stream.write(packet.metadata.data(), packet.metadata.size() + 1); // Includes null terminator
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return { reinterpret_cast<const std::uint8_t*>(buffer.read_data()), buffer.size() };
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    if (buffer.size() < 4) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), 4));
    }

    binary_stream stream(buffer);
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::fixed_length<4>(endian::le_to_native<NetworkPacket>(packet_id)));

    std::string username;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::prefixed<4>(username));

    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::fixed_length<4>(endian::le_to_native<NetworkPacket>(scores_count)));

    if (buffer.size() < stream.total_read() + 4*scores_count) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(stream.total_read(), 4*scores_count));
    }

    std::vector<uint32_t> scores(scores_count);
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::prefixed(scores_count, scores));

    std::string metadata;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::null_terminated(metadata));

    // Skip padding
    const auto min_req_size = 4 + 4 + 4 + 4*scores_count + metadata.find_first_of('\0') + 1; // include null terminator
    if (buffer.size() >= min_req_size) {
        stream.skip(buffer.size() - min_req_size);
    }

    NetworkPacket np;
    np.packet_id = packet_id;
    np.username = username;
    np.scores = scores;
    np.metadata = metadata;
    return np;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    if (buffer.size() < 4) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(buffer.size(), 4));
    }

    binary_stream stream(buffer);
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::fixed_length<4>(endian::le_to_native<PacketInfo>(packet_id)));

    std::string_view username;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::prefixed<4>(username));

    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::fixed_length<4>(endian::le_to_native<PacketInfo>(scores_count)));

    // Skip scores data
    stream.skip(scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    PacketInfo info;
    info.packet_id = packet_id;
    info.username = username;
    return info;
}

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    if (buffer.size() < 4) {

    }

    if (buffer.size() < stream.total_read() + scores_count * 4) {
        HEXI_THROW(buffer_underrun(stream.total_read(), scores_count * 4));

    std::vector<uint32_t> scores(scores_count);
    stream.get(stream_adaptors::prefixed(scores_count, scores));

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data() + buffer.size();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - buffer.size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    MessagePacket packet;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.read(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));
    
    const auto data = buffer.data() + sizeof(packet.header);
    packet.message = std::string_view { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(data), buffer.size() - sizeof(packet.header) };
    
    return packet;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    uint32_t swapped_header = hexi::endian::native_to_little(header);
    buffer.write(&swapped_header, sizeof(swapped_header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

template<size_t block_size>
BufferData<> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<> result;
    uint32_t swapped_header = 0;
    buffer.read(&swapped_header, sizeof(swapped_header));
    result.header = hexi::endian::little_to_native(swapped_header);
    result.data.resize_and_overwrite(data_length, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        buffer.read(data, size);
        return size;
    });
    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_from_buffer(const hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_peek) {
    const auto data = buffer.read_ptr();
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_peek);
    memcpy(destination.data(), data, bytes_to_peek);
    return destination;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/allocators/tls_block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024, size_t allocator_count = 100>
using tls_allocator_type = hexi::tls_block_allocator<hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>, allocator_count>;

template<size_t block_size, size_t allocator_count>
void enter_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    allocator.initialize();
}

template<size_t block_size, size_t allocator_count>
void exit_thread_with_allocator(tls_allocator_type<block_size, allocator_count>& allocator) {
    allocator.deinitialize();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T>
T convert_to_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_to_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::little_to_native(value);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<hexi::endian::conversion conv, typename T>
T convert_with_enum(T value) {
    switch(conv) {
        case hexi::endian::big_to_native:
            return hexi::endian::to_native_in<hexi::endian::big>(value);
        case hexi::endian::native_to_big:
            return hexi::endian::from_native_in<hexi::endian::big>(value);
        case hexi::endian::little_to_native:
            return hexi::endian::to_native_in<hexi::endian::little>(value);
        case hexi::endian::native_to_little:
            return hexi::endian::from_native_in<hexi::endian::little>(value);
        default:
            std::unreachable();
    }
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t read_size = storage.size();
    size_t read_max = std::min(bytes_to_preview, read_size);
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(read_max);
    const auto data = storage.read_ptr();
    memcpy(dest.data(), data + storage.read_offset(), read_max);
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    return { storage.size(), storage.free() };
}

template<size_t block_size>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <filesystem>
#include <utility>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace detail;

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_read);
    if(buffer.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Chained buffer too small to read uint32_t"));
    }
    
    uint32_t value = 0;
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_write);
    const auto swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_le(value);
    buffer.write(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> target(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(target.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return target;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
struct BufferInfo {
    size_t capacity;
    size_t current_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo<> get_buffer_info(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, 1024>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo<1024> info;
    info.capacity = 1024;
    info.current_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.write_size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    const auto read_len = buffer.read_size();
    size_t actual_preview = std::min(bytes_to_preview, read_len);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(actual_preview);
    memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr, actual_preview);
    return destination;
}
```</answer>

template<typename buffer_type>
constexpr auto varint_decode(buffer_type& buffer) -> int {
    int shift { 0 };
    int value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        buffer.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<int>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename buffer_type>
constexpr auto varint_encode(buffer_type& buffer, int value) -> int {
    int written = 0;

    while(value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        buffer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }

    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    buffer.put(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

template<typename buffer_type>
constexpr auto varint_decode(buffer_type& buffer) -> int {
    int shift { 0 };
    int value { 0 };
    std::uint8_t byte { 0 };

    do {
        byte = 0; // clear in case an error occurs
        buffer.get(&byte, 1);
        value |= (static_cast<int>(byte & 0x7f) << shift);
        shift += 7;
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename buffer_type>
constexpr auto varint_encode(buffer_type& buffer, int value) -> int {
    int written = 0;

    while(value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value & 0x7f) | 0x80;
        buffer.put(&byte, 1);
        value >>= 7;
        ++written;
    }

    const std::uint8_t byte = value & 0x7f;
    buffer.put(&byte, 1);
    return ++written;
}

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>

size_t get_stream_size(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.size();

    return stream.size() == 0;
}

struct StreamInfo {
    hexi::stream_state state;
    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {

    return info;
}

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <string>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    const auto size = str.size();
    const auto swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_big(size);
    char size_buf[4];
    memcpy(size_buf, &swapped, sizeof(swapped));
    writer.put(size_buf, 4);
    writer.put(str.data(), str.size());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    const auto size = reader.get_fixedint<4>();
    if (size <= 0) {
        return "";
    }
    char* data = new char[size];
    reader.get(data, size);
    std::string str(data, size);
    delete[] data;
    return str;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    const uint32_t count = container.size();
    writer.put(&count, sizeof(count));
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        writer.put(&element, sizeof(element));
    }
}

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint32_t count = 0;
    reader.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    std::vector<uint32_t> target;
    target.reserve(count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        uint32_t element = 0;
        reader.get(&element, sizeof(element));
        target.push_back(element);
    }
    return target;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    const auto data = buffer.read_ptr();
    for (std::size_t i = 0, j = buffer.size(); i < j; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    const auto data = buffer.read_ptr();
    for (std::size_t i = 0, j = buffer.size(); i < j; ++i) {
        if (data[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    return find_byte_in_buffer(buffer, value) != hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return {
        .size = buffer.size(),
        .read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr(),
        .is_empty = buffer.empty()
    };
}
```</answer>

	const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
	const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    const auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    std::array<std::uint8_t, Size> target{};
    for(std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;
    }
    return target;
}

        }
    }

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <vector>
#include <string>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    using namespace hexi;

    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    stream_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer, exception_tag());
    
    // Write packet ID in little-endian
    const auto id_le = endian::native_to_little(packet.packet_id);
    adaptor.put(&id_le, sizeof(id_le));

    // Serialize tags with prefixed varint encoding
    varint_encode_with_prefix(adaptor, packet.tags.size());
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        varint_encode_with_prefix(adaptor, tag.size());
        adaptor.put(tag.data(), tag.size());
    }

    // Serialize data with prefixed varint encoding
    varint_encode_with_prefix(adaptor, packet.data.size());
    adaptor.put(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    using namespace hexi;

    CompactPacket packet;
    stream_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer, exception_tag());

    // Read packet ID and convert to native endianness
    uint32_t id = 0;
    read_adaptor.get(&id, sizeof(id));
    packet.packet_id = endian::little_to_native(id);

    // Deserialize tags
    const auto tags_count = varint_decode<std::size_t>(read_adaptor);
    packet.tags.resize_and_overwrite(tags_count, [&](char*, size) { return size; });
    for (size_t i = 0; i < tags_count; ++i) {
        const auto tag_len = varint_decode<std::size_t>(read_adaptor);
        read_adaptor.get(packet.tags[i].data(), tag_len);
    }

    // Deserialize data
    const auto data_len = varint_decode<std::size_t>(read_adaptor);
    packet.data.resize_and_overwrite(data_len, [&](char* strbuf, size_t size) {
        read_adaptor.get(strbuf, size);
        return size;
    });

    return packet;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;

    // Write header (2 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));

    // Write data with varint prefix
    hexi::varint_encode(buffer, packet.data.size());
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    buffer.write(hexi::fill<16>(0x00));

    // Write footer (4 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.footer, sizeof(packet.footer));

    // Convert dynamic buffer to std::vector
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.read_data(), buffer.read_data() + buffer.size());
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Override the virtual methods from buffer_base
    std::size_t size() const override { return data_.size(); }
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { return data_.empty(); }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(input_data.size());
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor write_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Write data to the buffer
    write_adaptor.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());
    
    // Read data back from the buffer
    std::vector<uint8_t> read_data(input_data.size());
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    read_adaptor.read(read_data.data(), read_data.size());
    
    return read_data;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer_data);
    
    // Ensure there's enough data to peek
    if (adaptor.size() < peek_size) {
        // Handle error (e.g., throw or return empty), but example assumes valid input
        return {};
    }
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(peek_size);
    adaptor.copy(result.data(), peek_size);  // Copies data without advancing read cursor
    adaptor.read(result.data(), peek_size);  // Reads data, advancing read cursor
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;

    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {

    adaptor.write(data.id);

    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return buffer;

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    TypedData data;

    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
    return data;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    hexi::pmc::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    std::size_t total_write = 0;

    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        if (buffer.free() < chunk.size()) {
            // Attempt to resize buffer to accommodate the chunk
            buffer.resize_and_overwrite(chunk.size() - buffer.free(), [](char*, size) {
                return size;
            });
        }
        buffer.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
        total_write += chunk.size();
    }

    return total_write;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        const std::size_t read_size = std::min(chunk_size, adaptor.size());
        result.resize_and_overwrite(result.size() + read_size, [&](char* target, std::size_t size) {
            adaptor.read(target, size);
            return size;
        });
    }

    return result;
}

struct MeasurementData {

        stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        
        const uint32_t temp_count = static_cast<uint32_t>(temperatures.size());
        stream.put(&temp_count, sizeof(temp_count));
        
        for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {
            float swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temp);
            stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));

        double swapped_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(pressure);
        stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));

}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    MeasurementData data;
    stream >> data;
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    
    auto view = stream.view();
    const char* data_ptr = view->read_ptr();
    size_t name_len = 0;
    while (name_len < view->size() && data_ptr[name_len] != '\0') ++name_len;
    
    if (name_len == view->size()) {
        // No null terminator found
        return {-1, ""};
    }
    
    std::string_view sensor_name(data_ptr, name_len);
    stream.skip(name_len + 1); // Skip name + null terminator
    
    if (stream.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Insufficient data for sensor ID"));
    }
    
    uint32_t sensor_id = 0;
    stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    stream.skip(stream.size()); // Skip remaining data
    
    return {sensor_id, sensor_name};
}
